mapper.select: SELECT * FROM khuyen_mai ORDER BY ma DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO khuyen_mai (ma_code, tieu_de, phan_tram_giam, so_tien_giam_toi_da, ngay_bat_dau, ngay_ket_thuc, gioi_han_so_lan, so_lan_da_dung, hoat_dong) VALUES (#{maCode}, #{tieuDe}, #{phanTramGiam}, #{soTienGiamToiDa}, #{ngayBatDau}, #{ngayKetThuc}, #{soLanToiDa}, COALESCE(#{soLanDaDung}, 0), #{hoatDong})
mapper.update: UPDATE khuyen_mai SET so_lan_da_dung = so_lan_da_dung + 1 WHERE ma = #{ma}
UPDATE khuyen_mai SET so_lan_da_dung = GREATEST(so_lan_da_dung - 1, 0) WHERE ma = #{ma}
